query:
Two small things to flag before this goes to the   
  spec:
                                                     
  Rank normalization edge case (N=1): The formula 1 -
   rank/N produces 0.0 when a bucket has exactly one
  entry (1 - 1/1 = 0.0). An entry that's the only one
   accessed in a given phase/category slot gets no 
  boost — the opposite of the intent. The spec should
   use 1 - (rank - 1) / N instead: rank 1 of N gets
  1.0, rank N gets (N-1)/N. Single-entry buckets get
  1.0 (full signal).

  Verify query_log.ts storage type: The SQL in Goal 6
   — WHERE ts > strftime('%s', 'now') - lookback_days
   * 86400 — assumes ts is stored as INTEGER (Unix   
  epoch). If it's TEXT (ISO 8601 string, which SQLite
   sometimes defaults to with sqlx's chrono mapping),
   that arithmetic silently returns no rows. Confirm
  the column type before the spec locks in that SQL
  pattern. If it's TEXT, the filter becomes WHERE ts
  > datetime('now', '-' || ? || ' days').
\
Based on this revised scope... I want you to wipe all of the existing docs we did in the previous iteration, then begin the design protocol again at the scope completion phase then go forward according to our protocol
